summary: The implementation covers most core requirements with appropriate scene transitions, kawaii bear characters, question sequence, giftcards, flower bouquet, and personal photo ending. However, several missing or incomplete details exist related to specific acceptance criteria for bear reactions, giftcard image dependencies, and specialized UI features.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each bear reaction must include specified text message overlay with exact messages ('Love you 💕', 'You are magic ✨', etc.) displayed during animations
missing_requirements.reason: BearReaction component displays messages in overlay, but implementation does not show distinct message styling or verification that all 5 messages match exactly the specified text format from requirements

missing_requirements.requirement: All 6 giftcards must include small kawaii teddy bear stamp illustrations on each card
missing_requirements.reason: GiftcardsSection component references giftcard images but does not verify that the generated images contain teddy bear stamps. Implementation relies on external image assets without programmatic verification or fallback for bear stamps.

missing_requirements.requirement: A kawaii teddy bear character must appear presenting or holding the bouquet in the flower bouquet finale scene
missing_requirements.reason: FlowerBouquetFinale component shows a bear image (kawaii-white-bear-hearts.dim_400x400.png) but this is the 'throwing hearts' variant, not a 'presenting flowers' variant as specified in the image requirements (bear-presenting-flowers.dim_500x500.png). Wrong image asset used.

missing_requirements.requirement: Photo must display with a romantic frame or border matching the pastel pink/lavender theme using the specified photo-frame-romantic.dim_800x1000.png asset
missing_requirements.reason: PersonalPhotoEnding component creates frame borders programmatically with CSS but does not use the specified photo-frame-romantic.dim_800x1000.png image asset mentioned in requirements. The frame is created with div borders instead of the required image overlay.

missing_requirements.requirement: Components must reference static asset paths from frontend/public/assets/generated for displaying all generated images
missing_requirements.reason: PersonalPhotoEnding component references '/assets/Screenshot_20250826-210145~2.png' which is not in the specified frontend/public/assets/generated directory path. Asset path does not follow the required directory structure.

hallucinated_features.description: TeddyBear 3D component in AnimatedCanvas renders bears as 3D textured planes in Three.js scene
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 specifies replacing teddy bears with kawaii bears but does not require 3D rendering in the canvas. Requirements focus on 2D static image display throughout animation scenes, not 3D textured meshes in the background canvas.

hallucinated_features.description: Custom CSS animations added for bear reactions including animate-throw-hearts, animate-blush-pulse, animate-spin-360, animate-hug-scale
hallucinated_features.reason: While bear reactions are required, the specific custom animation class names and implementations in CSS were not specified in requirements. These appear to be implementation details beyond the scope of specified animations.

hallucinated_features.description: Sparkles icon component from lucide-react used in GiftcardsSection for visual effects
hallucinated_features.reason: Requirements specify sparkle effects but do not mandate using lucide-react icon library. This is an unspecified third-party dependency for decorative elements.
